page: The Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance provides 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to a single physical core with Hyper-Threading enabled. It features a substantial memory capacity of 32.0 GB, yielding a high resource density of 16.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is included with a 154 GB disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable, running under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark data indicates moderate single-core capabilities, with stress-ng and Geekbench single-core tests placing the processor in the average performance tier. However, multi-core performance and memory bandwidth for large blocks fall into the lower tier due to the physical core limitation. Cryptographic and vector operations are supported via hardware-accelerated instruction sets including AVX-512 and AES-NI, which help offset the lower core count for specific mathematical and secure workloads.

This server configuration is qualitatively cost-effective for applications that demand a large memory footprint without requiring extensive parallel processing power. It is designed for workloads such as small-scale databases, caching layers, memory-bound enterprise applications, and lightweight web serving where memory capacity is the primary bottleneck.
description: The Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring an Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 1 physical core running at 2.8 GHz. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16.0 GB per core, alongside 154 GB of local storage. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance delivers average single-core CPU and memory benchmark performance, though its multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities are constrained. This hardware profile makes the E4-2ds_v5 qualitatively cost-effective for memory-bound workloads that require a large memory footprint but modest parallel processing power, such as small databases, caching layers, and lightweight enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v5 is a memory-optimized instance featuring an Intel Xeon 8370C CPU, 2 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 154 GB local storage, designed for memory-intensive workloads with modest compute needs.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E4-2ds_v5 features 2 vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 154 GB local storage, optimized for memory-intensive, low-compute workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high memory density and local storage for workloads requiring modest compute and large memory footprints.

32.0 GB of RAM providing 16.0 GB per core
